rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN TAYLOR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Moore Securities Company¿s motion for summary judgment: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JORGE DAVID VS. CHEVRON USA INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Survival And Wrongful Death Actions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to consolidate survival and wrongful death actions is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 275510 and 275812 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 275510. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M. MCRAY et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint For Personal Injury -- Asbestos
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant John Crane, Inc.¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiffs¿ first amended complaint related to plaintiff¿s claim for punitive damages is denied. Plaintiff¿s complaint states facts sufficient to allege a claim for punitive damages. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: CASEY, PATRICIA AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 6. Defendants Cahill Contractors, Inc. and Cahill Construction Services, Inc.¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiffs¿ complaint related to punitive damages is granted with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff did not file a substantive opposition but just requested leave to amend. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: CASEY, PATRICIA AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. et al
